roonHost.title: Roon Core IP / Hostname
roonHost.description: Roon Core reachable from Homebridge. Empty = UDP discovery. Docker on same host as Core: LAN IP (e.g. 192.168.1.x) often fails; use host.docker.internal (compose: extra_hosts host.docker.internal:host-gateway) or default-gateway IP from inside the container, or leave empty to try discovery.

excludeZones.title: Exclude zones
excludeZones.description: Roon zone display names that should not appear in HomeKit.

includeVolumeLightbulb.title: Extra volume tile variant (off by default)
includeVolumeLightbulb.description: Adds an additional volume tile per zone. Turn this off for a minimal HomeKit UI.

includeVolumeFan.title: Volume tile (speaker) per zone
includeVolumeFan.description: Adds the main volume tile per zone.

includeZoneControllers.title: Zone controller tile per zone (Audio Receiver / TV icon with play/stop)
includeZoneControllers.description: Expose a per-zone play/stop tile using the device type selected below. With audioReceiver: shows an AV-Receiver icon; volume is accessible via iOS Control Center. Combine with includeVolumeFan for a volume slider tile alongside.

includeVolumeStepSwitches.title: Show per-zone +5/-5 volume step switches (minimal UI off by default)
includeVolumeStepSwitches.description: Expose volume +/- buttons. Disable for a minimal UI.

zoneDeviceType.title: Zone device type (Home app grouping)

oneOf.title: Audio Receiver (recommended: receiver icon + volume in Control Center)
TV (compatible: TV icon + volume in Control Center)
Smart Speaker (may show as unsupported on some iOS)

zoneDeviceType.description: How each Roon zone is represented in HomeKit when includeZoneControllers is enabled. audioReceiver and tv both use the Television service (most compatible) – they differ only in the icon shown in Home. audioReceiver shows an AV-Receiver icon; tv shows a TV icon. Both expose volume control via the iOS Control Center remote. SmartSpeaker/Speaker require AirPlay 2 and typically appear as 'Nicht unterstützt' in Apple Home.

radioPresetCount.title: Radio preset count (top used)
radioPresetCount.description: How many radio stations to expose as presets (per zone). 0 = expose all stations (can create many tiles).

genrePresetCount.title: Genre preset count (top used)
genrePresetCount.description: How many genres to expose as presets (per zone). 0 = expose all genres (can create many tiles).

radioStations.title: Radio stations filter
radioStations.description: Empty = all stations. Otherwise only listed station names.

playlists.title: Playlists filter
playlists.description: Empty = all playlists. Otherwise only listed playlist names.
